sources.exact_document_title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Cough – 46
sources.population: People presenting with cough; age limits are not stated in the applicability section.
sources.clinical_setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
sources.applicability_note: Direct for Dubai telehealth cough documentation; only partial for a general in-person GP workflow.

exact_sections.heading: 2. Scope; 3. Purpose; 4. Applicability
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Defines DHA telehealth scope, Dubai purpose, licensed-provider applicability, and emergency/controlled-medication exclusions.

exact_sections.heading: 5. Red Flags
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Lists cough features that require serious-condition assessment or face-to-face escalation.

exact_sections.heading: 6. Clinical History
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Specifies cough duration, quality, timing, risk factors, and associated-symptom history domains.

sources.exact_document_title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Acute Pharyngitis/Tonsillitis (Sore Throat)
sources.population: Adult and pediatric patients with sore throat.
sources.clinical_setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
sources.applicability_note: Direct for Dubai telehealth sore-throat documentation; partial for a general GP workflow across all settings.

exact_sections.heading: 1. Background
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Describes acute pharyngitis as commonly viral and self-limited while requiring systematic assessment for treatable or serious causes.

exact_sections.heading: 2. Scope; 3. Purpose; 4. Applicability
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Defines Dubai telehealth scope and exclusions for emergency and controlled-medication prescribing.

exact_sections.heading: 8. Referral Criteria and Red Flags
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Lists airway, swallowing, breathing, pain, immune compromise, neck stiffness, dehydration, and complication prompts for escalation.

sources.exact_document_title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Headaches in Adults
sources.clinical_setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
sources.applicability_note: Direct for adult Dubai telehealth headache documentation; partial because the baseline workflow has no adult-only filter and is not telehealth-only.

exact_sections.heading: 2. Scope; 3. Purpose; 4. Applicability
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Defines adult headache telehealth scope in DHA-licensed facilities and emergency exclusions.

exact_sections.heading: 7. Red Flags
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Provides systemic, neurologic, onset, associated-feature, and pattern-change red-flag domains.

exact_sections.heading: 8. Emergency Evaluation
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Identifies headache presentations requiring urgent face-to-face assessment.

sources.exact_document_title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Common Cold
sources.population: Adults and children with common cold; severity caveats for neonates, older people, and long-term conditions.
sources.clinical_setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
sources.applicability_note: Direct for common-cold telehealth documentation; only partial for the broader fever/URTI baseline workflow.

exact_sections.heading: 1. Background
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Identifies severity-risk contexts and distinguishes uncomplicated common cold from other respiratory presentations.

exact_sections.heading: 2. Scope; 3. Purpose; 4. Applicability
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Defines Dubai telehealth scope and emergency/controlled-medication exclusions.

exact_sections.heading: 6. Red Flags
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Lists respiratory, swallowing, neurologic, rash, and pediatric breathing concerns that require assessment or escalation.

sources.exact_document_title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Fever in Children
sources.clinical_setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
sources.applicability_note: Direct for pediatric fever telehealth documentation; partial for a mixed-age fever/URTI workflow.

exact_sections.heading: 1. Background
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Defines pediatric fever assessment context and the importance of age, measurement site, appearance, persistence, and underlying disease.

exact_sections.heading: 2. Scope; 3. Purpose; 4. Applicability
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Defines Dubai telehealth pediatric fever scope and emergency exclusions.

exact_sections.heading: 5.1 Virtual Clinical Assessment
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Prioritises airway, breathing, circulation, consciousness, age-specific risk, and illness-severity assessment.

exact_sections.heading: 7. Referral Criteria
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Uses risk features to guide emergency referral, specialist assessment, or explicitly documented safety-netting.

sources.exact_document_title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Dizziness
sources.population: People presenting with dizziness; age limits are not stated in the applicability section.
sources.clinical_setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
sources.applicability_note: Direct for Dubai telehealth dizziness documentation; partial for a general in-person GP workflow.

exact_sections.heading: 2. Scope; 3. Purpose; 4. Applicability
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Defines Dubai telehealth dizziness scope and emergency/controlled-medication exclusions.

exact_sections.heading: 5.1 Virtual Clinical Assessment
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Emphasises structured history and available examination to distinguish dizziness syndromes.

exact_sections.heading: 6. Red Flags
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Lists cardiac, neurologic, trauma, intoxication, visual, consciousness, and severe-headache concerns.

exact_sections.heading: 7. Clinical History
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Specifies symptom description, timing, triggers, concurrent symptoms, age, and pre-existing conditions.

exact_sections.heading: 8. Investigations
exact_sections.evidence_summary: States that tests depend on history and examination and should be documented only when clinically deemed necessary.

exact_sections.heading: 10. Referral Criteria
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Identifies emergency and specialist referral features for dizziness.
